summary: Summary: Speaker2 began after four hours of searching, expressing frustration and quickly moving to anger as they accused staff of laziness and asked if the bag was stolen. Speaker1 responded neutrally at first, providing arrival and compensation information. Speaker2 escalated with frustration and anger, voiced sadness about potentially losing their job if crucial data were gone, and showed surprise and anger when the bag was missing, even threatening an aggressive search. Speaker1, while mostly neutral, reacted with anger and frustration when pressed about theft and staff effort, noted that theft can occur, and ultimately offered a $50 solution and suggested shopping tomorrow (neutral). The conversation closed with Speaker2 thanking Speaker1 but still conveying anger and frustration.
